evidence_reviewed.finding: Repository rules confirm validation-first operation, no unauthorized Kaggle submission, no Steam scraping, no hidden/private labels, and that data/artifacts/submissions are local-only surfaces.
Expected final UserKNN fine-grid JSON is absent; this remains STALLED_INCOMPLETE and was not relaunched because it is not a fresh independent axis.
Expected expanded jackknife JSON is absent.
Expected expanded jackknife Markdown is absent.
Log has only 12 lines, processes seed42/seed7, starts seed123, and stops after invalid-value warnings without a final report.

Smoke top row vote_consensus__high_capacity_gap__B1__w0.1 has mean +0.0003667400146696309, min -0.0012002400480095599, 2/3 positive splits, fixes/breaks 252/230, p=0.33881500709211204; strict gate fails on effect size, min split, positivity, and significance.
Latest cron status reports the 16:01 KST OpenCode run as NO_SAFE_AXIS, no probe launched, no relevant process after the run, no new submission CSV, and clean safety flags.
Prior fresh OpenCode run reviewed the same stalled/weak/closed axes and found no fresh bounded independent validation-only axis.
Manual after-ALS loop stopped after two consecutive NO_SAFE_AXIS iterations with no probe; strongest ALS diagnostic row mean +0.00113356 but quarantine-conflicted and below strict mean gate.
Exit -13 was reconciled as wrapper SIGPIPE after iter03 artifacts were written; iter03 verdict NO_SAFE_AXIS, no probe, no candidate/submission CSV, no active relevant process.
Failed-axis ledger blocks stacker public regression, OTTO forced public negative vs current best, and current-best ALS independent strict failure as repeat candidates.
Runner state closes public-tested rankblend/ALS boundary/frontier/tagcf variants; skipped/quarantined families include ALS/rankblend retunes and boundary/frontier variants.

Diagnostic best row is 3/3 and p=0.021965674090633346 but mean +0.0011335600453423744 remains below +0.0015 and same-family/quarantine-conflicted.

evidence_reviewed.path: scripts/ direct rg inventory and ast-grep to_csv/subprocess search
evidence_reviewed.finding: Script inventory found many validation diagnostics, known closed model-family probes, full-test materializers, and submission-capable/autonomous-runner surfaces. No concrete bounded fresh independent validation-only probe was credible under the strict gate without repeating closed axes or risking forbidden candidate/submission materialization.

active_or_completed_processes.process: current Hermes/OpenCode wrapper and this worker's inspection commands
active_or_completed_processes.finding: ps showed the current OpenCode run launched by Hermes plus transient inspection commands; no separate validation probe, Kaggle submit process, UserKNN, jackknife, aggressive runner, or LightGCN training process was launched by this run.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Genuinely new validation-label-free base model family not already implemented locally
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.reason: Still the only theoretically acceptable direction, but this run found no concrete bounded local implementation surface with enough prior evidence to justify a validation-only probe under the strict gate.
Diagnostic best is below +0.0015 mean and same-family/quarantine-conflicted; pre-registered independent confirmation has negative min split and p=0.129.
Independent validation failed strict gate and forced public score 0.77815 did not beat current best 0.77825.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: UserKNN gated residual fine-grid and jackknife uncertainty boundary expansion
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.reason: UserKNN final JSON is absent; jackknife expanded report absent/incomplete and smoke top is weak with negative min split and p=0.3388. Relaunching would be duplicate busywork.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: DNS, hours-confidence, exact-K, temporal compatibility, boundary covariates, SL@K-lite, last-slot, semantic/text/README/LM, capacity/frontier, public-tested rankblend variants
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.reason: These are explicitly closed by prompt, ledgers, reports, or public-negative transfer.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Full-test materializers, autonomous runner, or submission-preflight variants
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.reason: Would risk creating uploadable candidate/submission CSVs or invoking Kaggle submission surfaces, violating this run's hard safety contract.

why_not_candidate: No fresh independent validation-only axis satisfied the strict gate or justified a bounded launch. The strongest remaining metric is a same-family ALS/rankblend diagnostic below the +0.0015 mean-delta gate and quarantine-conflicted; the pre-registered independent ALS row has a negative split and non-significant p-value. All other plausible local surfaces are explicitly closed, stalled/incomplete, weak, public-negative, duplicate, too expensive/unbounded for this run, or forbidden materializers/submission surfaces.
